status: COMPLETE — All 12 keyframes verified (11 trailer + 1 raid boss). v9.0 — skin tones corrected.
revisionLog: v2.0: Castle consistency fixed (scenes 01, 02), wolf replaced with French Bulldog CIA (scene 03), dragon redesigned cute/fat (scene 04), RegginA corrected to match ref sheet (scenes 05, 06, 11), all scenes verified

v3.0: RegginA updated to v5 (Explorer Ice/Light BLACK headband with prongs, White Fur Wrap Coat). Missing characters added: Panthera+Santaboy (scene 07), RegginO+Sweetiez (scene 08), all 7 chars (scene 11). Scenes 05, 06 regenerated with v5 headband.

v4.0: Panthera wings fixed from gold to DARK NAVY-BLUE/PURPLE feathered (scene 07 v3). Scene 04 v4 updated: Natehouoho now shown pulling card deck from pocket to check cards instead of summoning dragon.

v5.0: Characters added to scenes 09 and 10 to portray game depth. Scene 09 v2: RegginA + Natehouoho on SS Regina deck during Great Storm (fantasy meets history). Scene 10 v2: Panthera (dark wings, hell side), RegginA kneeling (center), RegginO (blossom side) before the Wheel of Samsara (spiritual/philosophical depth).

v6.0: Scene 10 v4 — RegginA headband corrected to match v5 ref sheet (TWO LARGE sharp matte-black leaf/petal prongs rising upward from headband, dramatic angular shapes). Panthera dark wings PERFECT. Used reference image for generation.

v7.0: Harpseal Zakum RegginA raid boss LOCKED (owner-approved). Ref sheet v3 all checks passed. Scene 12 added: boss fight arena with Hammer Flop attack + T-bone steak mechanic. Boss added to character bible v3.0.0. New game page harpseal-zakum.html created.

v8.0: Scene 09 REPLACED — old storm scene removed. New scene: R.M.S. REGINA luxury cruise ship pool deck. Characters interacting with amenities (water slides, pools, lounging). RegginA (sun lounger, hammer), Natehouoho (butterfly wings on water slide), RegginO (pink hair, flower crown, poolside cocktail), CIA French Bulldog (pool with vest + sunglasses). Setting: golden hour, infinity pools, glass water slides, tropical gardens, 22-deck mega vessel. Correct representation of the in-game Regina.

v9.0: CRITICAL FIX — Owner feedback: RegginA and RegginO must have DARK BROWN skin (not fair/pale/tanned). Natehouoho butterfly wings must NOT protrude through water slides. Ship must match R.M.S. Regina specs (transparent tube slides, modern mega-ship). Character bible updated: RegginA skin #6B4226, RegginO skin #5C3A1E. Scene 09 regenerated v9 with all corrections. Feedback learnings documented in pipeline/FEEDBACK-LEARNINGS.md. 9 iterations total for Scene 09.

characterAccuracy.reggina: VERIFIED v5 — DARK BROWN skin (#6B4226), golden blonde hair, BLACK headband with pointed feather prongs, white fur wrap coat, dark brown boots, golden hammer
characterAccuracy.natehouoho: VERIFIED — grey beanie, dark tactical jacket, teal-cyan/purple butterfly wings
characterAccuracy.reggino: VERIFIED — DARK BROWN skin (#5C3A1E), pink-magenta hair with lavender highlights, floral crown, dark navy tunic with gold/teal accents, magical orb
characterAccuracy.cia: VERIFIED — black/tan French Bulldog, CIA tactical vest, bat ears
characterAccuracy.panthera: VERIFIED — vivid crimson red hair, pale porcelain skin, red/gold ceremonial armor, DARK NAVY-BLUE/PURPLE feathered wings with golden mechanical shoulder guards at base only, holy orb
characterAccuracy.santaboy: VERIFIED — red Santa hat, rectangular glasses, red rose in mouth, full red Santa outfit, golden wings, candy cane weapon
characterAccuracy.sweetiez: VERIFIED — golden blonde twin-tail pigtails, petite build, dark purple combat dress, mystical staff
characterAccuracy.dragonDesign: VERIFIED — cute/fat round proportions with UE5 photorealistic rendering
characterAccuracy.harpsealZakumReggina: VERIFIED v3 LOCKED — chubby baby harp seal, Zakum golden-bronze helmet, white shutter shades, white beard, golden flipper armor, golden hammer, cyan-turquoise aura. Boss fight scene verified.

keyframes.name: BIRTH — Black. Then Light.
keyframes.verificationNotes: Castle architecture matches across all scenes. Multi-tiered fortress with beacon tower on rocky hilltop. Golden hour lighting with cherry blossoms.

keyframes.name: THE LIVING WORLD — 8 Biomes
keyframes.verificationNotes: Same castle visible as scene-01 (beacon tower, stone architecture). Bioluminescent mushrooms, cherry blossoms, wheat fields, market stalls around castle.

keyframes.name: COMPANIONS — Player Meets CIA
keyframes.verificationNotes: Wolf REPLACED with French Bulldog CIA. CIA verified: black/tan coat, bat ears, 'CIA' text on tactical vest, stocky build. TRUST: 12% UI element present. Gender-neutral adventurer.

keyframes.name: CARDS & COMBAT — Card Deck Check
keyframes.verificationNotes: Natehouoho pulling card deck from pocket to check cards. Grey beanie, dark tactical jacket with red accents, massive teal-cyan/purple butterfly wings with swirl patterns. Holding fan of holographic TCG cards, one glowing. Volcanic colosseum arena with lava cracks, torches, spectators. UE5 quality.

keyframes.name: CASTLE LIFE — Tavern Strategy
keyframes.verificationNotes: RegginA v5: golden blonde hair, BLACK headband with pointed prongs, tanned skin, white fur wrap coat, dark brown boots, golden hammer. CIA: French Bulldog with CIA vest text visible. Holographic war map, cozy tavern with fireplace, patrons in background.

keyframes.name: DLC 1: THE ABYSS — Frost Wyrm Boss
keyframes.verificationNotes: RegginA v5: golden blonde hair, BLACK headband prong visible, tanned skin, white fur wrap coat, dark brown boots, massive golden hammer mid-swing. Frost Wyrm: CHUBBY FAT round belly, stubby legs, tiny wings, icy blue-white scales, goofy smirk yet massive boss. Ice crystal cavern with bioluminescent blue crystals.

keyframes.name: DLC 2&3: Sky Islands + Championship
keyframes.verificationNotes: Panthera: vivid crimson red hair, pale skin, red/gold ceremonial armor, DARK NAVY-BLUE/PURPLE feathered wings (FIXED from gold), golden mechanical shoulder guards at base only, glowing holy orb. Santaboy: Santa hat, glasses, rose, full red outfit, golden wings (correct for him), candy cane with yellow ribbon. Background: crystal formations, griffins, guild airship, sunset clouds.

keyframes.name: DLC 4: THE FORGOTTEN FLOOR
keyframes.verificationNotes: RegginO: long pink-magenta hair with lavender highlights, floral crown, dark navy tunic with gold/teal accents, glowing teal magic orb. Sweetiez: extremely long golden blonde twin-tail pigtails, petite, dark purple combat dress, mystical staff. Environment: massive bioluminescent mushrooms (teal+purple), clockwork gears, spherical forbidden library.

keyframes.name: DLC 5: R.M.S. REGINA — Luxury Amenities
keyframes.verificationNotes: v9: CRITICAL SKIN TONE FIX per owner feedback. RegginA: DARK BROWN skin (#6B4226), golden blonde hair, black headband with leaf prongs, white swimsuit coverup, golden war hammer beside chair, vivid blue eyes — PASS. Natehouoho: grey knitted beanie, dark clothes, MASSIVE butterfly wings (teal-cyan/purple gradient) spread wide in OPEN AIR on deck near slide entrance, dual swords on back — PASS (wings NOT protruding through any structure). RegginO: DARK BROWN skin (#5C3A1E), very long vibrant pink-magenta hair past waist, flower crown, dark navy dress, sitting at pool edge, holding tropical drink, rainbow shimmer aura — PASS. Ship: R.M.S. REGINA modern mega-cruise with transparent tube water slides, tiered infinity pools, roller coaster track, glass biodome, golden-hour sunset — PASS. CIA dog and Sweetiez not visible (3/5 main characters present). 9 iterations total.

keyframes.name: SAMSARA — Every Creature Has a Soul
keyframes.verificationNotes: v4: RegginA headband BEST VERSION — TWO LARGE sharp matte-black angular leaf/petal prongs rising upward from black headband, matching v5 ref sheet (dramatic shapes, not small/subtle). Generated with reference image attached. Panthera: crimson hair, red/gold ceremonial armor, DARK NAVY-BLUE feathered wings spread wide with golden mechanical shoulder guards, holy orb — PERFECT. RegginA center: golden blonde hair, tanned brown skin, correct black prong headband, white fur coat, dark brown boots, golden hammer in hand. RegginO right: needs improvement (hair blonde instead of pink-magenta, white dress instead of navy tunic). Duality split: hellfire LEFT, cherry blossoms RIGHT. Dharma Wheel with yin-yang center. CIA French Bulldog not visible. Note: strongest composition overall, headband and Panthera nailed.

keyframes.name: GUILD ASSEMBLES — NumbahWan United
keyframes.verificationNotes: All 7 characters present: RegginA center (blonde hair, BLACK headband prongs, white fur coat, golden hammer), Natehouoho (grey beanie, butterfly wings), RegginO (pink hair, floral crown, magic orb), Sweetiez (blonde twin-tails, purple dress, staff), Panthera (crimson red hair visible). Grand guild hall with holographic war table, tapestries, torches. Note: Santaboy and CIA less visible — may need future iteration.

keyframes.name: RAID BOSS — Harpseal Zakum RegginA
keyframes.verificationNotes: Harpseal Zakum RegginA raid boss in massive underground arena. Chubby baby harp seal body with golden Zakum helmet, shutter shades, white beard, golden armor pauldrons, wielding huge golden hammer. Cyan-turquoise boss aura. Hammer Flop attack with golden crescent energy slash VFX. Magical T-bone steaks scattered on arena floor (T-bone steak transformation mechanic). RegginA and Natehouoho in foreground reacting to attack. All boss visual elements match locked ref sheet v3.

nextPhase.description: Generate 5-10s video clips per scene using verified keyframes as starting frames. Apply camera movements, transitions between scenes.
nextPhase.status: READY — all 12 keyframes verified and approved (11 trailer + 1 raid boss)
